profile.name: Dino Di Emidio
profile.headline: AI Strategist, Data Scientist, Sociologist
profile.tagline: I work on AI with a strong attention to people, clarity, and real usefulness.
profile.availability: Available for AI strategy, applied machine learning, and thoughtful digital collaborations.

hero.intro: My path moves from sociology to advanced AI systems, with a focus on building solutions that are rigorous, useful, and genuinely understandable for the people who use them.
hero.quote: Good technology should feel intelligent, but also clear, respectful, and human.

metrics.label: A profile that connects human insight with technical depth
From academic thinking to practical systems and products
Modern architectures designed for real use cases

manifesto: I work where intelligence needs both precision and empathy. Sociology shaped the way I read people and systems, while AI gave me the tools to turn that understanding into practical solutions.
I build retrieval pipelines, multi-agent workflows, decision-support tools, and AI experiences with one simple principle: technology should create clarity, trust, and real value.
I wanted this portfolio to feel personal, calm, and intentional. Not loud, but memorable.

education.label: Postgraduate distinction
education.detail: Management vision, AI strategy, and applied innovation

education.label: Graduate distinction
education.detail: Research depth in social data, analytics, and interpretation

education.label: Foundational distinction
education.detail: Human behavior, systems thinking, and critical analysis

services.title: Agentic AI Systems
services.desc: Multi-agent workflows, orchestration logic, and task automation built to move from demo to dependable production value.

services.title: RAG and Knowledge Design
services.desc: Retrieval systems that connect language models to structured truth, internal knowledge, and business-critical context.

services.title: AI Strategy and Innovation
services.desc: Use-case framing, product direction, and practical roadmaps for organizations adopting AI with care and clarity.

services.title: Predictive and Generative Modeling
services.desc: Advanced analytics, experimentation, fine-tuning direction, and model design with both business and human outcomes in mind.

impact: Designing generative and predictive AI architectures for next-generation automotive workflows.
Building explainable systems that connect experimentation, business intelligence, and decision support.
Turning advanced AI concepts into operational frameworks for real industrial use.
Architected Azure foundations for enterprise AI adoption.
Developed RAG assistants and vector-search solutions to unlock internal knowledge at scale.
Applied sociological frameworks to RLHF and evaluation tasks, improving alignment between model behavior and human expectations.
Analyzed player behavior datasets to predict churn and optimize economic balance.
Supported intelligent assistant and chatbot initiatives for user support scenarios.
